title: Alternative Algebraic Models in Information Retrieval
description: A comparative overview of key algebraic models used for vector space retrieval and ranking, showing their relationships and evolution.
relationships: VSM extends Boolean with partial matching and ranking
GVSM generalizes VSM by introducing linearly independent basis vectors
LSI is a specific application of GVSM using SVD for latent semantic analysis
Term Discrimination Model is an alternative approach to term weighting within the vector framework
